comparison_surface_note: Compares official Login serverbound cookie_response framed packet id and non-null key/payload body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

official_source.function_or_member: Identifier.parse(String), ServerboundCookieResponsePacket(Identifier, byte[]), ServerboundCookieResponsePacket.STREAM_CODEC, LoginProtocols.SERVERBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ServerboundCookieResponsePacket), LoginProtocols.SERVERBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), ServerboundCookieResponsePacket.key(), ServerboundCookieResponsePacket.payload(), ServerLoginPacketListener extends ServerCookiePacketListener

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Login, Direction::Serverbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Login serverbound cookie_response framed dispatch/decode; not a cookie storage policy, request/response runtime behavior, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion test.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Login serverbound cookie_response packet framing and dispatch/decode for one non-null payload fixture only; it does not prove cookie storage policy, request/response runtime behavior, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
